subtitles.login_desc: Authenticate to access your encrypted communications
subtitles.register_desc: Create a secure identity. No email required.
subtitles.verify_desc: Verify you are human using your device's biometric sensor.

messages.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
messages.keys_not_found: Keys not found in local storage.
messages.decrypt_failed: Wrong password. Failed to decrypt key.
messages.verify_later: You can verify later in Settings to unlock full features.
messages.welcome: Welcome! You can view your recovery phrase in Settings.
messages.device_not_supported: Your device does not support biometric authentication. You will start in Sandbox mode.

marketing.industrial_desc: Your communications are protected with end-to-end encryption using the Signal Protocol.
marketing.anonymity_desc: Your username is hashed on your device. We don't know who you are.

errors.biometric_corrupt: Biometric key invalid or corrupted. Please enter password manually.
errors.biometric_security: Biometric authentication is not available due to security settings.
errors.biometric_locked: Device is locked or already authenticated. Please try again later.
errors.biometric_failed: Biometric login failed. Please use password or try again.

validation.name_length: Name must be less than 80 characters
validation.username_required: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.username_format: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters

restore.title: Account Recovery
restore.subtitle: Zero-Knowledge Password Reset
restore.error_mnemonic: Invalid recovery phrase. Please check for typos.
restore.error_generic: Recovery failed. Please verify your details.
